tests.test_name: Appium - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a single Appium test fixture and verifies that the documentation pipeline produces valid, fully-resolved JSON output containing at least one named test.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Appium - PO - single test, core output structure
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'appium' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'appium_single_sample.java', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains 1 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Appium - PO - DataProvider expands one test per row
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a data-driven Appium fixture and verifies that each DataProvider row is expanded into its own discrete test entry in the JSON output.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Appium - PO - DataProvider expands one test per row
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'appium' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'appium_datadriven_sample.java', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains 3 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Appium - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a single Appium test fixture and verifies that the JSON output includes a populated test_coverage_matrix on the first test, confirming the QAM-role enrichment pipeline is working.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Appium - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'appium' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'appium_single_sample.java', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains 1 or more tests, every test has a non-empty test_name, and the first test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a data-driven Appium fixture and verifies that DataProvider rows are collapsed into a single test with a coverage matrix whose row count and schema match the expected data-driven structure.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'appium' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'appium_datadriven_sample.java', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains exactly 1 test, test has a non-empty test_name, coverage matrix row count matches the DataProvider examples, and rows conform to the 'generic' schema
